notableEvents.label: Colson Montgomery grand slam
notableEvents.detail: Colson Montgomery hits a grand slam (1) to center field. Chase Meidroth scores. Munetaka Murakami scores. Miguel Vargas scores.

notableEvents.label: Chase Meidroth GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Chase Meidroth grounds into a double play, shortstop Joey Ortiz to second baseman Brice Turang to first baseman Gary Sánchez. Tristan Peters out at 2nd. Chase Meidroth out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Edgar Quero GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Edgar Quero grounds into a double play, second baseman Brice Turang to shortstop Joey Ortiz to first baseman Jake Bauers. Andrew Benintendi out at 2nd. Edgar Quero out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Jake Bauers pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Jake Bauers grounds out to first baseman Munetaka Murakami. Sal Frelick to 3rd.

notableEvents.label: Christian Yelich pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Christian Yelich homers (1) on a fly ball to right field. Brice Turang scores. Luis Rengifo scores.

notableEvents.label: Jake Bauers pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Jake Bauers grounds out to first baseman Munetaka Murakami. Sal Frelick to 3rd.
